title: lolium italicum var. boucheanum
intro: Lolium italicum var. boucheanum, commonly known as Bouche's Italian ryegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate urine production and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of Bouche's Italian ryegrass include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of kidney stones and other urinary tract issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
